columns.name: AdditionalFields
columns.description: The type specifc fields that Sentinel adds. Contains the TLPLevel: white, green, amber, or red.

columns.name: AzureTenantId
columns.description: The tenant that submitted the indicator.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: Confidence
columns.description: The confidence that the creator has in the correctness of their data. The value must be a number in the range of 0-100.

columns.name: Created
columns.description: The date when the indicator was created.

columns.name: Data
columns.description: All object properties, formatted according to the STIX specification (https://docs.oasis-open.org/cti/stix/v2.1/os/stix-v2.1-os.pdf).

columns.name: Id
columns.description: A value that uniquely identifies the indicator STIX object. This value is usable with Sentinel APIs.

columns.name: IsActive
columns.description: A value that specifies if an indicator is active and valid for detections.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: IsDeleted
columns.description: A value that indicates whether the data was deleted from Sentinel or not.

columns.name: LastUpdateMethod
columns.description: The component that last updated the indicator.

columns.name: Modified
columns.description: The date when the indicator was modified.

columns.name: ObservableKey
columns.description: The entire left-hand side of an equality comparison from the pattern.

columns.name: ObservableValue
columns.description: The entire right-hand side of an equality comparison from the pattern.

columns.name: Pattern
columns.description: The detection pattern for this indicator MAY be expressed as a STIX pattern.

columns.name: _ResourceId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the resource that the record is associated with

columns.name: Revoked
columns.description: A value that specifies whether the indicator was revoked.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: _SubscriptionId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the subscription that the record is associated with

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: Sentinel defined tags for the indicator.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time of indicator ingestion.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: ValidFrom
columns.description: The time from which this indicator is considered a valid indicator of the behaviors it is related or represents.

columns.name: ValidUntil
columns.description: The time at which this indicator should no longer be considered a valid indicator of the bahviors it is related to or represents.

columns.name: WorkspaceId
columns.description: The workspace that submitted the indicator.
